zh.lifeSummary: Roger de Mildenhall於大約1180年出生在英國英格蘭肯特納金頓。他於從1199年1月8日到1217年1月7日與Agnes在英國肯特林普聖 斯分恩斯 邱奇結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。他去世於大約1250年在英國英格蘭肯特坎特布瑞享年72歲。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Mildenhall
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Minall
meanings: English: a local pronunciation of Mildenhall (1), from the Wilts place-name, which is recorded as Mildenhall otherwise Minal in 1760.

nameMeanings.name: Roger
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French personal name, Rog(i)er, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, from hrōd ‘fame’ + gār, gēr ‘spear’. This was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain, replacing the native Old English form Hrōðgār. Roger was one of the most popular boys' names throughout the medieval period, but less so after the Reformation, though it has continued in regular use to the present day. Roger, Count of Sicily ( c.1031–1101 ), son of Tancred, recovered Sicily from the Arabs. His son, also called Roger, ruled Sicily as king, presiding over a court noted for its splendour and patronage of the arts.

variants.name: Rodger
meanings: Variant spelling of   Roger  , in part from the surname derived from the given name in the Middle Ages.

en.lifeSummary: Roger de Mildenhall was born about 1180, in Nackington, Kent, England, United Kingdom. He married Agnes from 8 January 1199 to 7 January 1217, in St Stephen's Church, Lympne, Kent, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son. He died about 1250, in Canterbury, Kent, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 72.

fr.lifeSummary: Roger de Mildenhall est né environ 1180, à Nackington, Kent, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Il a épousé Agnes du 8 janvier 1199 au 7 janvier 1217, à St Stephen's Church, Lympne, Kent, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Il est décédé environ 1250, à Canterbury, Kent, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 72 ans.

it.lifeSummary: Roger de Mildenhall è nato il circa 1180 nel Nackington, Kent, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Lui sposato Agnes da 8 gennaio 1199 a 7 gennaio 1217, nel St Stephen's Church, Lympne, Kent, England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì circa 1250, nel Canterbury, Kent, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 72 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Roger de Mildenhallは約1180年にイギリスイギリスケントナクイントンで生まれた。から1199年1月8日まで1217年1月7日にイギリスケントリンプンスト ステフエン'ス チャーチでAgnesと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼は約1250年にイギリスイギリスケントカンテルブリーで72歳で死去した。

ko.St Stephen's Church, Lympne, Kent, Engla: 영국 켄트 림p니 스트 스테프'스 c후르치
ko.lifeSummary: Roger de Mildenhall(은)는 대략 1180년 영국 잉글랜드 켄트 나킨그턴에서 태어났다. 그는 1199년 1월 8일부터 1217년 1월 7일까지 영국 켄트 림p니 스트 스테프'스 c후르치에서 Agnes(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 대략 1250년 영국 잉글랜드 켄트 캉르버이에서 72세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Roger de Mildenhall nasceu aproximadamente 1180, em Nackington, Kent, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Ele casou-se com Agnes de 8 de janeiro de 1199 a 7 de janeiro de 1217, em St Stephen's Church, Lympne, Kent, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ele faleceu aproximadamente 1250, em Canterbury, Kent, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 72 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Roger de Mildenhall родился около 1180 г. в местности наккингтон, кэнт, Англия, Великобритания. Он женился на женщине по имени Agnes с 8 января 1199 по 7 января 1217 в местности ст стифен'с чурч, лимпн, кэнт, Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Он умер около 1250 г. в местности кантирбури, кэнт, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 72 лет.
